claims.text: What is claimed is: 1. A pharmaceutical composition comprising repaglinide and metformin together with a suitable carrier. 2. A pharmaceutical composition of claim 1 provided in the form of a tablet. ...
4. A method for treating non-insulin dependent diabetes mellitus (NIDDM) comprising administering to a patient in need of such treatment repaglinide in combination with metformin.
4. A method for treating non-insulin dependent diabetes mellitus (NIDDM) comprising administering to a patient in need of such treatment repaglinide in combination with metformin.

use_codes.desc: USE OF REPAGLINIDE IN COMBINATION WITH METFORMIN TO LOWER BLOOD GLUCOSE
